lowering_classes.static_pass: Behavior can be flattened entirely through the current jsmx/jsmethod surfaces.
lowering_classes.slow_path_needed: Behavior is valid JS but requires a translator-emitted dynamic slow path outside the current flattened layer.
lowering_classes.unsupported: Behavior is intentionally outside the current project scope.

translation_modes.idiomatic_flattened: The fixture demonstrates the intended flattened lowering into jsmx/jsmethod APIs rather than the literal source structure.
translation_modes.idiomatic_slow_path: The fixture demonstrates the intended translator-emitted slow path outside the flattened jsmx layer.
translation_modes.literal: The fixture intentionally mirrors the upstream source shape more directly than the normal idiomatic translation style.

cases.notes: Translated against the thin jsmethod toWellFormed layer. The original typeof/prototype assertion is intentionally omitted at the library layer.
Translated as an explicit translator slow path: a receiver callback models the dynamic object toString hook, then jsmethod preserves the method semantics.
Translated against jsstr16 NFC normalization semantics. The JS-level distinction between normalize() and normalize(undefined) collapses to the same library operation.
Translated against jsstr16 explicit normalization-form semantics, mapping the JS form strings to unicode_normalization_form_t.
Translated against jsstr16 explicit normalization-form semantics after JS coercion has collapsed the form argument to a string.
Translated against unicode_normalization_form_parse, mapping JS invalid-form RangeError behavior to EINVAL at the C layer.
Translated against the thin jsmethod normalize layer, which surfaces abrupt ToString(form) completion through typed method errors.
Translated against the thin jsmethod normalize layer, which rejects Symbol form arguments with a typed method error.
Translated against the thin jsmethod normalize layer, which surfaces abrupt ToString(this) completion through typed method errors.
Translated against the thin jsmethod normalize layer, which rejects Symbol receivers during String.prototype.normalize coercion.
Translated against the thin jsmethod normalize layer, which enforces RequireObjectCoercible(this) before string normalization.
Translated against the thin jsmethod normalize layer, which rejects undefined receivers before string normalization.
Translated against the thin jsmethod toLowerCase layer. The original primitive-vs-String-object distinction is intentionally omitted at the library layer.
Translated as an explicit translator slow path: a receiver callback materializes the boxed Boolean string coercion result before jsmethod performs uppercasing.
Translated against the thin jsmethod toUpperCase layer. The original primitive-vs-String-object distinction is intentionally omitted at the library layer.
Translated against the thin jsmethod toUpperCase layer using the upstream escaped code-unit cases from test262 special_casing.js.
Translated against the thin jsmethod toLocaleUpperCase layer through the locale-insensitive path used when no locale tag is supplied.

Translated against the thin jsmethod toLocaleUpperCase layer for the Azeri conditional mappings from the intl402 test262 suite.
Translated against the thin jsmethod isWellFormed layer. The original typeof assertion is intentionally omitted at the library layer.
Translated as an explicit translator slow path: a receiver callback models the dynamic ToPrimitive failure and jsmethod preserves the String.prototype.toLowerCase rejection behavior.
Translated against the thin jsmethod toLocaleLowerCase layer for the Turkish conditional mappings from the intl402 test262 suite.

Translated against the thin jsmethod lastIndexOf layer for primitive miss behavior.

Translated as an idiomatic slow path: the upstream boxed Number receiver is lowered to its primitive string value before dispatching into jsmethod lastIndexOf.
Translated against the thin jsmethod includes layer for primitive hit and miss semantics.

Repo-authored idiomatic value-semantics fixture for object and array truthiness plus same-vs-different identity across native and JSON-backed containers.

Repo-authored idiomatic lookup fixture for JSON-backed property/index reads, hasOwn checks, and the current ENOTSUP mutation boundary before promotion.
Repo-authored idiomatic native object/array fixture for overwrite behavior that preserves object size and array length while missing reads continue to return undefined.
Repo-authored idiomatic lowering-contract fixture for ENOBUFS on undersized shallow-promotion plans and dense native array mutation beyond the translator-chosen capacity.
Repo-authored idiomatic dense-array fixture for overwriting existing indices without changing logical length, then emitting the updated dense sequence.
Repo-authored idiomatic dense-array fixture for observable length growth, writes into grown slots, and a later shrink that truncates the visible dense prefix.
